description: Oracle Analytics Desktop is open on the Windows desktop. Using the dataset 'sample_order_lines2023.xlsx' located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OracleAnalyticsData\sample_order_lines2023.xlsx, create a Trellis (Small Multiples) line chart visualization to compare quarterly profit trends across regions and categories. Configure the visualization with Product Category as columns and Region as rows. Rename the canvas to 'Quarterly Profit by Region and Category' and save the project as 'Trellis_Profit_Analysis'.

metadata.expected_canvas_name: Quarterly Profit by Region and Category
